item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, seringkali kebijakan publik lebih fokus pada kebutuhan masyarakat luas, sehingga hak-hak individu bisa terabaikan dalam beberapa kasus.

notes: Both agents oppose an absolute society-over-individual priority and converge slightly toward a rights-protective legal-balance frame. Agent A remains consistent: collective interests matter, but individual rights require legal protection and institutional balancing. Agent B begins with a balanced disagreement and becomes more critical of public policy that prioritizes broad social needs while neglecting individual rights. Agent B turn 6 contains language-holding issues ('Saya still') and awkward Indonesian ('tidak tepat sampaikannya'), but the substantive stance remains readable.
